name: Luxury Indoor Golf
address: 185 S Westmonte Dr Suite 1214, Altamonte Springs, FL 32714
about: Luxury Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf simulator facility in Central Florida, offering a private, distraction-free environment for golfers. The venue features TrackMan and Uneekor technology, providing elite-level performance and a true indoor golf experience. It operates on a mixed pricing model, offering both flexible hourly bookings and tiered membership options to suit different needs and budgets.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive daily free hours for Full Members

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator system for precision tracking and performance
Secondary simulator system for elite performance and customization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can use your own clubs, the venue provides access to top-tier simulator technology and club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers customizable catering packages for events, but no mention of outside food or drink is made.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Rounds typically take about 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding kid-friendliness or junior programs.
